meta.title: Featured Events
meta.description: Displays dynamically queried events from The Events Calendar in a vertically stacked layout with image and content panels, supporting automatic and manual selection modes.

requiredPatterns.usage: Empty state handling for SSR preview
Rename block in list view based on heading
PHP-rendered event cards preview in editor

componentStructure.container: div.container with dark pattern pseudo-element background
componentStructure.header: ThemeHeading with eyebrow, heading, description in 2-column layout
componentStructure.eventsList: FilteredServerSideRender renders PHP event cards vertically stacked

qualityChecklist: TSX and PHP heading/layout structure match
No hardcoded colors - uses theme tokens
FilteredServerSideRender with querySelector and ref pattern
Card template part exists for tribe_events
The Events Calendar date meta used correctly (_EventStartDate)
Future events: ASC order, Past events: DESC order

attributes.name: heading
attributes.description: Main heading text (e.g. 'Join Our Upcoming Events')

attributes.name: selectedPosts
attributes.description: Array of event post IDs for manual mode

attributes.name: postsLimit
attributes.description: Maximum number of events to display (automatic mode)

attributes.name: eventList
attributes.description: Show future or past events (automatic mode only)

attributes.name: selectedEventCategories
attributes.description: Event category (tribe_events_cat) filter for automatic mode

attributes.name: selectedTags
attributes.description: Tag filter for automatic mode (post_tag taxonomy on events)

attributes.name: hideIfEmpty
attributes.description: Hide entire section if query returns no events

attributes.name: buttonLabel
attributes.description: Text label for the event card CTA button

section.notes: Always dark mode. Uses theme dark class pattern.

container.classes: container relative py-16 md:py-16 before:absolute before:bg-dark-pattern before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-x-(--side-gutter) before:inset-y-0 md:before:-inset-x-8
container.notes: Dark pattern pseudo-element background. 64px padding = py-16.

themeHeading.notes: ThemeHeading with H3 size (Anton 56px desktop), 2-column layout (heading left ~51%, description right). Gap between heading row and event cards = 64px = mb-16.

eventsList.notes: Vertical stack. Gap between event cards defaults to 64px (gap-16). Single card shown in Figma; multi-card uses same gap as header-to-cards.

eventCard.notes: Two-panel card. Stacks on mobile (image top, content bottom). Fixed 349px height on desktop per Figma. On mobile, height becomes auto.

eventCardLink.classes: flex flex-col md:flex-row md:h-[349px] group no-underline!
eventCardLink.notes: Entire card is a link wrapping both halves. Group class for hover effects.

imageHalf.classes: md:w-1/2 bg-charcoal rounded-3xl p-4 relative overflow-hidden
imageHalf.notes: Left 50% on desktop. bg-charcoal (#1f1f1d), 25px radius = rounded-3xl, 16px padding = p-4.

imageInner.notes: Inner image frame with 12px radius = rounded-xl.

dateBadge.classes: absolute top-4 right-4 w-[104px] bg-charcoal rounded-lg py-3 px-1 text-center text-white flex flex-col items-center
dateBadge.notes: Floating badge on image top-right. 104px wide, dark bg, 8px radius = rounded-lg. Within the image inner frame padding area, so positioned absolute inside imageHalf at top-4 right-4 (accounts for the 16px padding of imageHalf).

dateBadgeDayOfWeek.notes: Day of week abbreviation (e.g. 'Wed'). Roboto Medium 16px/1.5.

contentHalf.classes: md:w-1/2 bg-charcoal rounded-3xl p-6 flex flex-col justify-between text-white
contentHalf.notes: Right 50% on desktop. bg-charcoal, 25px radius, 24px padding = p-6. Justify-between pushes button to bottom.

contentGroup.notes: Top area with 8px gap between title, location, description.

eventTitle.notes: Anton Regular 48px/1.1 = text-header-4. White text inherited from parent.

eventLocation.notes: General Sans Medium 16px/1.5. Note: theme uses General Sans as font-sans. White text inherited.

eventDescription.notes: Roboto Medium 16px/1.5. Same size as location. White text inherited. Note: Figma shows Roboto but theme body is General Sans. Using font-sans for consistency.

eventButton.notes: Tertiary button with arrow. 'VIEW EVENT' uppercase. Uses theme btn-tertiary + btn-tertiary-arrow pattern. Text from buttonLabel attribute.

mobile.behavior: Event card halves stack vertically (image on top, content below). Fixed height becomes auto. ThemeHeading collapses to single column. Container padding adjusts via --side-gutter. Date badge stays in same relative position on image.

tablet.behavior: Same as desktop layout (two halves side by side). ThemeHeading uses 2 columns.

desktop.behavior: Two-panel card at 349px height. ThemeHeading 2-column layout. 64px vertical padding and gaps.

emptyState.field: hideIfEmpty controls section visibility when no events found

editorBehavior.ssrPreview: FilteredServerSideRender renders event cards from PHP

cardTemplatePart.dateFormatting: Extract day-of-week, day number, month+year from _EventStartDate
cardTemplatePart.venueResolution: Get venue title from _EventVenueID via get_the_title()
cardTemplatePart.imageHandling: Featured image with object-cover, fallback to no-image graceful handling
cardTemplatePart.buttonLabel: Passed from parent block via set_query_var/get_query_var or inline rendering

eventCard.notes: Each event card is an article element for semantic structure

eventCardLink.notes: Entire card wrapped in <a> for single click target. Button text provides accessible link text via sr-only span with event title.

dateBadge.notes: Date badge is decorative since date info is also conveyed by the event title/context. Use aria-hidden on badge so screen readers don't read fragmented date.

image.alt: Event featured image alt text from WordPress media library

accessibility.notes: No carousel pattern needed - events are stacked vertically, not in a carousel. Standard link/article semantics apply.

decisions.decision: Events stack vertically (no carousel) with gap-16 between cards
decisions.evidence: Spec says 'It should allow for more than one event, in that case it will show one below the other.'

decisions.decision: Dark mode always applied - section uses dark bg-transparent! with dark-pattern pseudo-element
decisions.evidence: Spec: 'The dark background will always be present.' Figma shows charcoal card panels on light page background. Section header uses dark text; the dark bg covers the container area.

decisions.decision: No carousel attributes needed - no Swiper, no navigation, no pagination
decisions.evidence: Spec specifies vertical stacking. Figma shows single event card. No carousel controls visible.
Figma variable defs show H4 = Anton Regular 48px/1.1. Structural analysis confirms 'Anton Regular 48px/1.1, white'.

decisions.decision: Event card fixed height 349px on desktop, auto on mobile
decisions.evidence: Structural analysis: 'Event card row height: 349px'. Mobile should be auto for content flexibility.

decisions.decision: Image half padding 16px (p-4), content half padding 24px (p-6)
decisions.evidence: Structural analysis measurements: Image half padding 16px, Content half padding 24px.

decisions.decision: Date badge 104px wide, positioned absolute top-right within image half
decisions.evidence: Structural analysis: 'Date badge width: 104px, position: top-right corner of image area'.

decisions.decision: Card halves use rounded-3xl (25px), image inner uses rounded-xl (12px), date badge uses rounded-lg (8px)
decisions.evidence: Structural analysis: card halves 25px, image inner 12px, badge 8px.

decisions.decision: Use TEC meta _EventStartDate for date display and query filtering, _EventVenueID for venue
decisions.evidence: Spec: 'The Events post type is the one created by the plugin The Events Calendar.' TEC stores event dates in _EventStartDate meta and venue as _EventVenueID.

decisions.decision: No related mode - only automatic and manual selection
decisions.evidence: Spec mentions only 'selected manually or automatically'. No related mode requested.

decisions.decision: ThemeHeading uses headingSize 3 (H3 = Anton 56px on desktop)
decisions.evidence: Figma variables: H3 = Anton Regular font/size/5xl = 56px/1.1

decisions.decision: Two card halves sit flush (no gap between them)
decisions.evidence: Structural analysis: 'The two card halves sit flush against each other (no gap) but have separate border-radius, creating a split-card visual effect.'

decisions.decision: Button label editable via sidebar TextControl, default 'View Event'
decisions.evidence: Spec for featured-post pattern says button label should be editable. Figma shows 'VIEW EVENT' text.

decisions.decision: Card template part rendered inline in PHP (not via get_template_part) since button label needs to be passed from parent block
decisions.evidence: The buttonLabel attribute needs to flow from the block to each event card. Using inline rendering in the block PHP rather than a separate template part avoids complexity of set_query_var. However, for reusability, create parts/card-tribe_events.php that accepts $args with buttonLabel.

decisions.decision: Inter-card gap is 24px (gap-6) for tighter stacking
decisions.evidence: Figma only shows one card. 64px gap between header and cards area, but between cards themselves a tighter gap of 24px provides visual grouping. If user prefers different, flag as unresolved.

unresolvedDecisions.question: What is the vertical gap between multiple stacked event cards?
unresolvedDecisions.reason: Figma only shows a single event card. Cannot determine inter-card spacing. Using 24px as default for tight grouping of related items.

unresolvedDecisions.question: Should the entire card be a clickable link, or only the button?
options: Entire card is a link (better UX)
Only the button links to event
unresolvedDecisions.reason: Figma shows a 'VIEW EVENT' button but the card layout suggests the whole card could be clickable. Following card-post pattern where entire card is wrapped in <a>.

variations.demoDescription: Default configuration showing future events sorted ASC (closest first). ThemeHeading with eyebrow, heading, and description.
Past events sorted DESC (latest first). Tests eventList toggle.
Hand-picked events using PostSelectorSortable. Tests manual mode.
Only heading provided. Tests empty state handling for eyebrow, description, and optional fields.
Very long heading and description text. Tests overflow and text wrapping.
Shows a single event. Tests limit of 1.
Tests hideIfEmpty behavior - section should be hidden if no events match.

tecIntegration.venueResolution: Venue is a separate post type (tribe_venue). Get venue name via get_the_title(_EventVenueID). Get venue address parts from venue post meta (_VenueAddress, _VenueCity, _VenueState).
tecIntegration.queryNotes: Use standard WP_Query with meta_query on _EventStartDate for future/past filtering. TEC also has tribe_get_events() but standard WP_Query with meta is more reliable for custom blocks.

editorPattern.approach: FilteredServerSideRender - entire block rendered by PHP since it's dynamic content. No Swiper needed. Editor shows ThemeHeading (editable) + SSR event cards.
sidebarPanels: Content (source, eventList, taxonomy filters, limit, hideIfEmpty, buttonLabel)

cardRendering.approach: Create parts/card-tribe_events.php as a reusable template part. The block PHP loops through query results and renders each card. The buttonLabel is passed via $args to the template part using get_template_part('parts/card', 'tribe_events', ['buttonLabel' => $buttonLabel]).
cardRendering.dateFormatting: Parse _EventStartDate with PHP date functions to extract day-of-week (D), day number (d), month (M), year (Y).

implementationNotes.noJsFile: This block does NOT need a frontend JS file. No carousel, no interactive behavior. Pure PHP rendering.
implementationNotes.existingPatterns: Follow DynamicContentCarousel for query patterns, ContentWithMedia for card layout reference.
